event: The barge port and Saint Mammes
description: A wide river or canal stretches across the composition, reflecting the cloudy blue-violet sky above. Several dark barges are moored along the left bank, where a grassy path runs alongside the water. A solitary figure walks along the towpath. On the right bank, a row of houses with colored facades stands at the water's edge, their reflections shimmering in the calm surface. The sky is expansive, filled with broken clouds painted in soft blues, whites, and pale yellows. The brushwork is loose and characteristic of Impressionism.

_meta.title: The Barge Port and Saint Mammes
